name: IP STRATEGY HOLDINGS, INC.
business: IP Strategy Holdings operates a diversified business centered on digital asset based infrastructure and intellectual property management, primarily focused on $IP Tokens of the Story Network, and operates validator nodes to earn staking rewards. The company also operates a craft spirits segment through Heritage Distilling Company, producing and selling super-premium whiskeys and flavored spirits. The spirits business sells to wholesale distributors, direct-to-consumer online, and through tribal beverage network partners.

exposures.sentence: Our craft spirits segment includes the production, marketing, licensing, and sale of a diverse line of award-winning craft super-premium whiskeys and premium-flavored whiskeys, under our owned and licensed brands, with a focus on wholesale distribution, DtC sales, and the expansion of our Tribal Beverage Network (TBN) through licensing and royalty arrangements.
We operate a diversified business centered on digital asset based infrastructure and intellectual property ( IP ) management, supplemented by a legacy craft spirits operating segment.
We established our validator business in September 2025 to allow us to derive yield and revenue from our large $IP Token holdings.
We stake the majority of the $IP Tokens in our treasury to earn a staking yield and turn our treasury into a productive asset.
In September 2025, the Technology and Cryptocurrency Committee of our Board approved our sale of covered call options using less than 2% of the total amount of $IP Tokens we own.
We have begun the process of moving our $IP Tokens into third-party custodied accounts.

catalysts.event: Completion of $220 million offering of pre-paid stock purchase warrants and acquisition of 53.2 million $IP Tokens
catalysts.sentence: In August 2025, we consummated a $220 million offering of our pre-paid stock purchase warrants in which we acquired 53.2 million $IP Tokens for our digital asset treasury.
We established our validator business in September 2025 to allow us to derive yield and revenue from our large $IP Token holdings.

In early December 2025, we established a new validator under a custodian account held at Crypto.com, to which account we moved 1 million $IP Tokens from our own wallet for testing on the new validator.

catalysts.event: Custody arrangements with Bitgo.com and Kraken
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we also established new custody arrangements with Bitgo.com and Kraken to give us flexibility and diversity for our future staking operations.

catalysts.event: Board approval to increase covered call authorization to 3 million $IP Tokens
catalysts.sentence: On January 6, 2026, the Board increased this authorized amount to 3 million $IP Tokens, which on such date represented approximately 5.6% of the $IP Tokens in our treasury.
The Story Foundation approved in late January 2026 and announced publicly on February 2, 2026 a set of governance changes aimed at strengthening the long-term health of the Story Layer 1 blockchain.

catalysts.event: Planned movement of majority of $IP Tokens to third-party custodians
catalysts.sentence: We began the process of moving nearly all of our $IP Tokens to our custodied validators in first quarter of 2026; however, we have not yet determined the final amounts or percentages of our $IP Tokens that will be allocated to each custodial account.

tamClaims.claim: The global spirits market is approximately $288 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: Our spirits business operates in the craft segment of the approximately $288 billion global spirits market.

tamClaims.claim: There are 532 tribal casinos across 29 states, generating approximately $44 billion in annual revenue, and approximately 250 locations are viable candidates for participation in the TBN.
tamClaims.sentence: As of December 31, 2025, there were 532 tribal casinos across 29 states, generating approximately $44 billion in annual revenue.

tamClaims.claim: The total population of active military, retired military and dependent affiliated persons is 45.75 million people.
tamClaims.sentence: Assuming 1.5 dependents per person (a dependent is defined by the military as a spouse, child under 21 unmarried or under 23 if a student, parent or custodian dependent), the total population of active military, retired military and dependent affiliated persons is 45.75 million people.
